title: Figure 3 in Echinococcus granulosus sensu stricto: silencing of thioredoxin peroxidase impairs the differentiation of protoscoleces into metacestodes
author: Wang, Hui
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Figure 3. RNAi effects on EgTPx expression and viability of cultured protoscoleces. (A) Quantitative PCR analysis of EgTPx mRNA in siRNA-1/2/3-treated or untreated protoscoleces. (B) Western blotting analysis and quantification graph of EgTPx protein expression in siRNA-1/2/3-treated or untreated protoscoleces. (C), (D) RNAi effects on the viability of siRNA-treated protoscoleces under oxidative stress (H2O2, 0.6 mM, 1 h) by day 3. Bars represent the standard deviation. *p <0.05; **p <0.01; ***p <0.001.
steps_raw: Figure 3. RNAi effects on EgTPx expression and viability of cultured protoscoleces. (A) Quantitative PCR analysis of EgTPx mRNA in siRNA-1/2/3-treated or untreated protoscoleces. (B) Western blotting analysis and quantification graph of EgTPx protein expression in siRNA-1/2/3-treated or untreated protoscoleces. (C), (D) RNAi effects on the viability of siRNA-treated protoscoleces under oxidative stress (H2O2, 0.6 mM, 1 h) by day 3. Bars represent the standard deviation. *p <0.05; **p <0.01; ***p <0.001.
